Subject: Request for Extension on Upcoming Project Submission

Dear Professor Smith,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension for the group project currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for reaching out with this request so close to the deadline, as I understand the importance of adhering to your schedule.

There are two primary reasons for my request. First, our team encountered an unexpected technical issue with our data collection software yesterday, which significantly delayed our progress. We spent the entire evening troubleshooting and finally resolved the problem only an hour ago, meaning we have lost valuable time that was critical for completing the analysis phase. Second, one of our key team members has been dealing with a sudden family emergency that required their immediate attention, making it difficult for them to contribute fully to the final draft as planned.

We are confident that a short extension would allow us to submit a high-quality project that meets all your expectations without rushing or compromising our work. We are committed to finishing the assignment thoroughly and would greatly appreciate any flexibility you might offer regarding the deadline. Thank you very much for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

Jordan Lee
